headline: Piper Sandler Lifts Darden Restaurants (DRI) Target, Cites Continued Traffic Strength
summary: Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE:DRI) will trade ex-dividend on July 10, putting it among the 10 Best July Dividend Stocks to Buy. On June 26, Piper Sandler raised its price recommendation on Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE:DRI) to $212 from $208. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the stock. Following Darden’s fourth-quarter results, analyst Brian Mullan said […]

headline: Darden Restaurants (DRI) Leaves Russell Indexes After Record Sales And Bylaw Changes
summary: Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) has been removed from multiple Russell indexes following the latest index reconstitution. The change comes after the company reported record-breaking sales and opened a significant number of new restaurants. Darden also recently amended its bylaws, affecting how shareholders can nominate directors to the board. Darden Restaurants is a major US casual dining operator, known for chains such as Olive Garden and others across the full service segment. The company...

headline: Darden Restaurants (DRI) Stock After Recent Run Is There Still Value In The Price
summary: If you are wondering whether Darden Restaurants stock is still fairly priced after its recent run, or whether the current level offers value, this article breaks down what the market might be implying about the company. Darden Restaurants recently closed at US$213.72, with returns of 0.8% over the past week, 4.8% over the past month, 14.2% year to date and 1.1% over the last year. This naturally raises questions about how much of the story is already reflected in the price. Recent coverage...
